emails.subject: Non-terminated deals
emails.body: Non-terminated deals Debbie, The credit committee needs to get some information from us that I could use your help with. Can I get a dump of the non-terminated deals into excel and I will format it from there. The information they need to see are the counterparty name, cash flows (MTM value) and positions. As always, they need it by 11:00 this morning so if you could let me know if this is something your group could provide me with I would appreciate it. Thanks Kam x3-5781

emails.subject: FW: Non-terminated deals
emails.body: FW: Non-terminated deals Just for gas? To: Brackett, Debbie R.

emails.subject: RE: Non-terminated deals
emails.body: Let me know if you needed additional Enron companies
